findings.title: Authority metadata is preserved
findings.detail: Retrieval results preserve source type, authority level, edge status, and non-primary evidence warnings.

findings.title: Generated reports remain non-authoritative
findings.detail: Generated-report results are marked with generated_report_warning and not_primary_evidence.

findings.title: Whole graph remains non-authoritative
findings.detail: Reference health keeps whole_graph_authority=false and named_edge_groups_only scope.

recommended_conditions: Do not allow retrieval consumers to flatten authority levels.
Generated reports may rank review priorities but may not become primary evidence.
Student-facing and adaptive uses remain blocked.
